parameters.query:
INSERT INTO users (
  id, first_name, full_name, email, alias, dob, phone, created_by_name, created_by_id,
  shift_effective_from, zuid, confirm, territories, date_format, status,
  profile_id, profile_name, created_time, modified_time
)
VALUES
{{ $json.bulkValues }}
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
  first_name = VALUES(first_name),
  full_name = VALUES(full_name),
  email = VALUES(email),
  alias = VALUES(alias),
  dob = VALUES(dob),
  phone = VALUES(phone),
  created_by_name = VALUES(created_by_name),
  created_by_id = VALUES(created_by_id),
  shift_effective_from = VALUES(shift_effective_from),
  zuid = VALUES(zuid),
  confirm = VALUES(confirm),
  territories = VALUES(territories),
  date_format = VALUES(date_format),
  status = VALUES(status),
  profile_id = VALUES(profile_id),
  profile_name = VALUES(profile_name),
  created_time = VALUES(created_time),
  modified_time = VALUES(modified_time);
